positive: Minimalist forest creature silhouette, featuring a stylized deer blending into bioluminescent fern fronds and moss. The scene should evoke a blend of woodland magic and geometric abstraction. Use high contrast black ink on a creamy parchment background, emphasizing clean lines and strong negative space. The composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel print, suitable for a single-color vector-like output with limited, ethereal glow accents of cyan and teal. Intricate details in the foliage and antlers, clean edges, sophisticated, highly aesthetic, vector art style, flat graphic design, dotwork, symmetry, magical realism, zentangle.
